text.title: Modular Monolith Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Trigger: payments needs an SLA the rest of the system cannot meet. Steps 1-4 had already named bounded contexts (orders, payments, inventory, users), defined public APIs, schema-per-module, and added import-linter. Step 5 produced an event PaymentCaptured. Step 6 records payments as extraction-ready. Future extraction is straightforward.

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
